extension.description: Play a sound and show a notification when an AI response is ready.
command.notify.title: Ping Me: Notify
command.permissionRequest.title: Ping Me: Permission Request
config.automaticDetection.description: Enable automatic detection of AI responses via inactivity timer. When disabled, notifications only trigger via the URI handler or the command.
config.enableUriHandler.description: Enable the URI handler so external tools can trigger notifications by calling 'open vscode://yhondri.ping-me/notify'. Useful for AI agents like Claude Code: add it as a Stop hook in ~/.claude/settings.json to get notified when a task finishes.
